payload.label: bed
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a bed corner showing a light beige–gray, horizontally striped fabric bedspread over the mattress with a slightly wrinkled texture and rounded corner; the bed is edge-cropped in the frame and the camera appears close (≈0.7 m).
